title: psoralea lanceolata var. stenostachys
intro: Psoralea lanceolata var. stenostachys, also known as the 'Chinese Psoralea', is a plant species within the legume family, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psoralea lanceolata var. stenostachys include improving immune function, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural detoxifier. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support kidney and liver health.
